release_notes: - In-app automatic updates via Sparkle — no more manual downloads. - Persistent log file at ~/Library/Logs/OnAir/ for post-mortem diagnostics. - Detailed Teams WebSocket logging with full JSON on meeting transitions. - Fixed dark mode not applying to Configuration and Statistics windows. - Fixed Cmd+C/V/X/A not working in text fields (LSUIElement keyboard routing). - Fixed shortcut confirmation window closing too quickly when multiple triggers fire. - Configuration and Statistics windows now appear in Command-Tab. - Menu bar icon tooltip shows current status, active platform, and meeting duration. - Post-reload safety net prevents device from staying ON after configuration changes. - Cleaned up legacy configuration keys and added automatic config migration. - ATS diagnostic at startup confirms ESPHome HTTP connectivity. - Build script verifies NSAllowsLocalNetworking in the compiled app. - Distribution migrated from Dropbox to GitHub Releases.
